title: Point Blank Pillagers
description: Replaces Pillagers' crossbows with guns from the Vic's Point Blank mod.
body:
# Point Blank Pillagers

**Point Blank Pillagers** replaces the primitive crossbow with a massive arsenal of modern firearms from the *Vic's Point Blank* mod. Pillagers are now a tactical threat featuring realistic accuracy and fire rates.

![Rooftop sniper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b53331e86ebf09b29ec43d1b96d842bb028bcbb0.jpeg)

---

## More than just giving Pillagers guns

* **Weapon Spawn Mechanics:** Every Pillager now spawns with one of **55 guns** from **5 tiers of rarity**.

* **True RPM:** Fire rates are mathematically synchronized to the gun's data. A Vector will spray at 1,200 RPM, while an L96A1 sniper will have a realistic bolt-action delay between shots.

* **Realistic Accuracy:** Featuring a dynamic accuracy system tailored to every gun type and its distance from the target. Pillagers are more accurate at close range but experience realistic bullet spread at a distance.

* **Magazine & Reload System:** Pillagers respect magazine capacities. They will lay down suppressive fire until their mag is empty, forcing them into a vulnerable reload window.

---

### Technical Specifications

* **Built for:** Fabric 1.21.11 & 1.21.1
* **Required Dependencies:** [Vic's Point Blank](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank/versions?g=1.21.11&g=1.21.1&l=fabric)
    * Fabric API
